title: ET13374498 - HR Admin Manager (Permanent)
description:
The Company
Our client in the financial services sector is currently looking for a HR Admin Manager to join their dynamic team.

The Role
This role is responsible for delivering comprehensive HR and office administration support across the employee lifecycle, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and a high standard of service. Key responsibilities include maintaining up-to-date employee records, payroll, leave, CPF, and benefits data with strict confidentiality, managing end-to-end recruitment and onboarding, and conducting background checks in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements. The role also supports audits, compliance reviews, performance management cycles, IR8A preparation, and Employment Pass applications, while liaising with relevant authorities as required. In addition, the position oversees day-to-day office administration, drives process improvements to enhance efficiency and user experience, and ensures the secure handling of company documents and sensitive information.

Your Profile
The ideal candidate holds a degree in Human Resources Management, Business, or a related discipline, with a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in HR operations, preferably in a standalone role. A strong understanding of employment regulations is essential. The role requires proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, a high level of integrity, accountability, and self-discipline, as well as excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Apply Today
Please send your resume, in WORD format only and quote reference number ET13374498, by clicking the apply button. Please note that only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

EA Licence no.: 07C5595 | Tan Yee Le (Elise) EA Registration no.: R1330020

postedCompany.description:
ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.


Founded in 1948, Robert Half (NYSE symbol: RHI) pioneered specialised recruitment services and today - with more than 325 staffing locations worldwide - Robert Half is the world's leader in placing accounting, finance, banking and technology professionals on a temporary and permanent basis.

In Singapore, Robert Half operates four divisions:

  • Robert Half Finance and Accounting: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent finance and accounting personnel
  • Robert Half Financial Services: Recruitment services for high-calibre financial services, insurance and banking professionals
  • Robert Half Management Resources: Recruitment services for senior-level finance, accounting and business systems professionals on a project and interim basis
  • Robert Half Technology: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent IT professionals

Robert Half also is the parent company of Protiviti®, a global consulting and internal audit firm composed of experts in risk, advisory and transaction services.
